description: Atlantis GBP (GBPA) is the 1:1 British Pound (GBP)-indexed onchain stablecoin for global payments, clearing, and multi-currency settlement. Launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — GBPA brings holders, users, traders, and platforms instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability, enabling secure, reliable, pound-denominated value transfer across the Atlantis Kingdom and Earth.
name: Atlantis GBP
